title: euonymus indicus
intro: Euonymus indicus, also known as the Indian spindle tree or Winged Spindle, is a deciduous shrub native to the Himalayan region and parts of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, leaves, and roots, which contain alkaloids and flavonoids that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Euonymus indicus include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Euonymus indicus are typically made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
